search_query: how long will windows 10 be supported
combined_text: Microsoft makes it official: Windows 10 will receive security fixes for ten years "Home Windows News Microsoft makes it official: Windows 10 will receive security fixes for ten years The company will offer ""mainstream"" support for its upcoming OS until 2020 at the earliest, and ""extended"" support until at least 2025.
